title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Netsol Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Netsol Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Netsol Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Surat-based team.

About Netsol Technologies:
Netsol Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netsol Technologies!
